references.title: UI refresh
references.borrowed: Calmer chrome, dimmer navigation, and consistent headers across adjacent work surfaces.
references.rejected: No dark-theme mimicry, no product-marketing gloss, and no generic issue-tracker metaphors.

references.title: Welcome to the new Linear
references.borrowed: Reduced visual noise, higher density, and clearer separation between navigation and main work.
references.rejected: Did not copy Linear's inbox framing or product-specific sidebar treatment.

references.title: Nested Layouts
references.borrowed: Persistent section chrome and child-route continuity without shell flicker.
references.rejected: Did not add dashboard-like provider or segment complexity beyond the existing workspace ledger.

references.title: New dashboard navigation available
references.borrowed: Resizable sidebar logic, consistent tabs, and mobile-aware persistent navigation patterns.
references.rejected: Did not use a floating mobile bar or team/project switching metaphors.

references.title: Data table
references.borrowed: Dense row scanning, compact toolbar behavior, hover-only sort affordances, and disciplined row action posture.
references.rejected: Did not turn callback work into a generic tabular batch-action console.

references.title: Content guide
references.borrowed: Plain-spoken, service-grade wording and sentence-case labels.
references.rejected: Avoided abstract platform language and avoided shorthand that would obscure callback consequences.

references.title: Typography
references.borrowed: Disciplined hierarchy, readable sizing, and restrained emphasis for dense operational information.
references.rejected: Did not import NHS branding directly or overfit the workspace shell to public-service page templates.

references.title: Timeline
references.borrowed: Timeline as brief chronological evidence, not as the working environment itself.
references.rejected: Did not use the timeline as navigation, a progress indicator, or a full-detail event dump.

references.title: Timeline
references.borrowed: Clear vertical markers and event readability in the attempt ladder.
references.rejected: Did not decorate the callback ladder with badge-heavy status ornament or generic feed framing.
